name: Apple Crisp (with Corn Flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Put half of the apples in a greased 9" x 9" pan.
3. Blend together remaining ingredients, except juice, and crumble half the flour mixture over the apples.
4. Cover with remaining apples and flour mixture.
5. Pour juice over top.
6. Bake for 35 minutes.
